title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
summary: Moonshot AI released Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source coding-focused agentic model with a Mixture-of-Experts architecture, 1 trillion parameters, and 256K context window. The accompanying Kimi Code CLI enables repository exploration, file editing, command execution, and testing from the terminal, with a plan mode for investigating codebases before making changes.
writeup: The video covers Moonshot AI's release of Kimi K2.7 Code, an open-source coding-focused agentic model built on a Mixture-of-Experts architecture with one trillion parameters and a 256K context window. It also details Kimi Code CLI, the accompanying terminal tool for repository exploration, file editing, command execution, and testing. The takeaways: an open-weight model at trillion-parameter scale aimed at agentic coding, paired with a CLI that handles end-to-end development tasks from the terminal.
